turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi there. I need to move my Saturday appointment to sometime next week. I have a family function.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Of course! Celebrations take priority. Name and appointment details please?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Smita Parekh. Saturday 10 AM with Dr. Kavitha Reddy.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Got it. Dr. Reddy has openings next week on Tuesday at 11 AM and Thursday at 3 PM.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Rescheduled! Smita Parekh, Tuesday at 11 AM with Dr. Kavitha Reddy. Enjoy your family function!

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Thank you so much, very sweet of you.
